channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: AprilNEA/OpenLogi
item.description: ⚡️A native, local-first alternative to Logitech Options+, written in Rust 🦀 — remap buttons, DPI, and SmartShift over HID++. No account, no telemetry.

item.title: liyue-aigc/female-portrait-director
item.description: A modular Codex Skill for directing and expanding detailed AI female portrait prompts.

item.title: Sophomoresty/gemini-web2api
item.description: Convert Google Gemini web into OpenAI-compatible API. Zero auth, cross-platform, single file.

item.title: GordenSun/GordenPPTSkill
item.description: AI-friendly PPT builder skill: 17 hand-polished Chinese PPTX templates + non-destructive text-only editing tools (python-pptx based). Pick a template, write edits.json, build a real .pptx with the layout intact. Personal/research use only.

item.title: garnix-io/garnix-ci
item.description: CI and hosting for nix-based, flakified github repos

item.title: Stem-Studio/Engine
item.description: Stem Studio, the web game engine

item.title: nianzhibai/91
item.description: nine one

item.title: mims-harvard/AutoScientists
item.description: AutoScientists: Self-Organizing Agent Teams for Long-Running Scientific Experimentation

item.title: luolangaga/tubatool
item.description: (no description)

item.title: UditAkhourii/adhd
item.description: ADHD — a skill for coding agents. Tree-of-thought with pruning, built on the Claude & Codex Agent SDK. Fans out parallel divergent thoughts under different cognitive frames, scores, prunes traps, deepens the survivors. The no-brainer skill for creative and interdisciplinary work.

item.title: AndrewPrifer/liquid-dom
item.description: Liquid Glass for the Web

item.title: open-gsd/gsd-core
item.description: Git. Ship. Done - Core

item.title: hexo-ai/sia
item.description: SIA is a Self Improving AI framework to autonomously improve the performance of any AI system (Model / Agent) on a benchmark task.

item.title: withkynam/vibecode-pro-max-kit
item.description: Your AI forgets. This remembers. Spec-driven coding harness for vibecoders, product owners, CEOs and real builders — self-improving context memory, 12 agents, 32 skills. Kills context rot, ships features, not spaghetti. Claude Code & Codex. Any stack. 30 seconds

item.title: alibaba/open-code-review
item.description: Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.

item.title: unicity-sphere/sphere-sdk
item.description: The SDK for autonomous economic agents. Give an agent an identity, a wallet, and the ability to find, negotiate with, and settle with other agents - peer-to-peer, with perfect privacy and ultra-fast finality

item.title: amatsuda/rubish
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Michaelliv/pi-dynamic-workflows
item.description: (no description)

item.title: bookorbit/bookorbit
item.description: BookOrbit: Your Reading Space

item.title: OpenBMB/PilotDeck
item.description: Task-oriented AI Agent productivity platform

item.title: zarazhangrui/feishu-claude-code-bridge
item.description: Bot that bridges Feishu/Lark messenger with a local Claude Code CLI — streaming cards, per-chat sessions, multiple workspaces

item.title: affaan-m/ECC
item.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

item.title: MoonshotAI/kimi-code
item.description: The Starting Point for Next-Gen Agents

item.title: microsoft/SkillOpt
item.description: SkillOpt is a text-space optimizer that trains reusable natural-language skills for frozen LLM agents through trajectory-driven edits, validation-gated updates, and deployable best_skill.md artifacts.

item.title: microsoft/Webwright
item.description: A simple SWE style browser agent framework that achieves SOTA results on long horizon web tasks.

item.title: itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
item.description: Free, open-source Windows optimization tool for performance, privacy, and simplicity.

item.title: Helvesec/rmux
item.description: Universal Rust multiplexer with a typed SDK — drive any CLI or TUI app from code. Native on Linux, macOS, and Windows.

item.title: elementalsouls/Claude-BugHunter
item.description: A Claude Code skill bundle for bug hunting and external red-team work - 51 skills, 15 slash commands, 574+ disclosed-report patterns curated across 24 vulnerability classes, plus enterprise identity + infrastructure attack matrices.

item.title: browser-use/terminal
item.description: Terminal UI to get stuff done in the browser

item.title: microsoft/AI-Engineering-Coach
item.description: better agentic engineering

item.title: modaic-ai/gepa-viz
item.description: Interactive live visualizer for gepa runs

item.title: yui540/comimi
item.description: Open-source comic reader library for JS/TS

item.title: gnurio/tufte-vdqi-plugin
item.description: Give your AI agents the skill of visualizing data the way Edward Tufte intended.

item.title: 7etsuo/project-based-tutorials-in-c
item.description: Curated project-based C tutorials for building emulators, kernels, databases, games, compilers, shells, and low-level tools.

item.title: Hmbown/CodeWhale
item.description: Coding agent for open source, open weight models

item.title: tspader/sp
item.description: A modern C standard library

item.title: jianshuo/ccglass
item.description: See what your coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, Kimi) sends to the model — local proxy + web dashboard

item.title: VILA-Lab/FigMirror
item.description: An Automated AI Agent Tool for Plotting Your Data in Any Paper's Figure Style.
